description: Delete a payment record by ID.
Delete a rental transaction by ID.

template: DELETE FROM film_actor WHERE actor_id = {film_actor_actor_id} AND film_id = {film_actor_film_id}
description: Remove an actor from a film.

template: DELETE FROM film_category WHERE film_id = {film_category_film_id} AND category_id = {film_category_category_id}
description: Remove a category from a film.

template: DELETE FROM inventory WHERE film_id = {inventory_film_id} AND store_id = {inventory_store_id}
description: Remove inventory copies of a film from a store.

template: DELETE FROM payment WHERE customer_id = {payment_customer_id} AND amount < {payment_amount}
description: Delete payments for a customer below a certain amount.

template: DELETE FROM rental WHERE customer_id = {rental_customer_id} AND rental_date < "{rental_rental_date}"
description: Delete old rentals for a customer before a specific date.
